steps.title: Identify the preservation rule
steps.content: Wood only survives when protected by sediment from oxygen. This rule is the key to determining what must be true about the discovered ship.

steps.title: Apply the rule to reach the conclusion
steps.content: The ship's wood survived, so it must have been protected by sediment. The correct answer directly states this condition. The other choices introduce facts not mentioned in the passage. That confirms D is correct.
